name: Livia |  Long Time No See
description:
Meet Livia! An awkward mess of a mouse girl who's both excited and nervous for you to meet the new "her" after all these years!

Scenario: You're meeting up with an old friend to catch up and hang out. Things seem to have changed a bit since last time you all talked.

Art: Original art Extra Art Extra Art 2

Please go check out the extra art! Its adorable and I want yall to see it

Message from creator: TRANS MOUSE TRANS MOUSE TRANS MOUSE!

Meant mainly for fluff but as always, feel free to fuck the mouse.

Oh I used the valentine tag just to turn it pink bc it fits

I really hope I did art this cute justice..

UNTESTED, FEEL FREE TO LEAVE FEEDBACk
creator: Pumpkindie
